svg.text: LoRA LR = Full fine-tuning LR × 10 (about 15× for short training)

text.font-family: Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: Must be applied to all layers (especially MLP/MoE; applying only to attention layers significantly degrades performance)

text.font-family: Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: Even rank=1 can achieve full fine-tuning performance (only O(1) bits absorbed per episode)

text.font-family: Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: FLOPs ≈ 2/3 of full fine-tuning (2N² vs 3N²); LoRA is better when plotting performance against FLOPs

svg.text: Multi-tenant service: vLLM/SGLang support loading multiple adapters simultaneously

text.font-family: Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: SFT recommended rank 64-256 | RL recommended rank 8-32 | 1/r scaling makes LR approximately independent of rank
